items.label: Spoon drama
items.title: Max inherits the spoon
items.text: Tunisia are now propping things up on 0 pts with GD -10. Not the trophy anyone wants.

items.label: Most goals
items.title: Most Goals badge has shifted
items.text: Charlie (Germany), Seb (Netherlands) now lead the nation scoring race on 10 goals.

items.label: Stinker watch
items.title: Jake is having a stinker
items.text: Turkey, Uzbekistan, Jordan have played 6 matches without a win. That is a long old watch.
